impl core::error::Error for zenpredict::PredictError
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenpredict::PredictError
pub fn zenpredict::PredictError::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

impl core::marker::Freeze for zenpredict::PredictError
impl core::marker::Send for zenpredict::PredictError

pub struct zenpredict::Predictor<'a>
impl<'a> zenpredict::Predictor<'a>
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::argmin_masked(&mut self, &[f32], &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, zenpredict::argmin::ScoreTransform, core::option::Option<&zenpredict::argmin::ArgminOffsets<'_>>) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<usize>, zenpredict::PredictError>
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::argmin_masked_in_range(&mut self, &[f32], (usize, usize), &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, zenpredict::argmin::ScoreTransform, core::option::Option<&zenpredict::argmin::ArgminOffsets<'_>>) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<usize>, zenpredict::PredictError>

pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::n_outputs(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::new(&'a zenpredict::Model) -> Self

pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::predict_transformed(&mut self, &[f32]) -> core::result::Result<&[f32], zenpredict::PredictError>
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::schema_hash(&self) -> u64

impl<'a> core::marker::Send for zenpredict::Predictor<'a>

pub struct zenpredict::Predictor<'a>
impl<'a> zenpredict::Predictor<'a>
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::argmin_masked(&mut self, &[f32], &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, zenpredict::argmin::ScoreTransform, core::option::Option<&zenpredict::argmin::ArgminOffsets<'_>>) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<usize>, zenpredict::PredictError>
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::argmin_masked_in_range(&mut self, &[f32], (usize, usize), &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, zenpredict::argmin::ScoreTransform, core::option::Option<&zenpredict::argmin::ArgminOffsets<'_>>) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<usize>, zenpredict::PredictError>
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::argmin_masked_top_k<const K: usize>(&mut self, &[f32], &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, zenpredict::argmin::ScoreTransform, core::option::Option<&zenpredict::argmin::ArgminOffsets<'_>>) -> core::result::Result<[core::option::Option<usize>; K], zenpredict::PredictError>
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::argmin_masked_top_k_in_range<const K: usize>(&mut self, &[f32], (usize, usize), &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, zenpredict::argmin::ScoreTransform, core::option::Option<&zenpredict::argmin::ArgminOffsets<'_>>) -> core::result::Result<[core::option::Option<usize>; K], zenpredict::PredictError>
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::argmin_masked_top_k_with_scorer<const K: usize, F>(&mut self, &[f32], &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, F) -> core::result::Result<[core::option::Option<usize>; K], zenpredict::PredictError> where F: core::ops::function::Fn(&[f32], usize) -> f32
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::argmin_masked_top_k_with_scorer_in_range<const K: usize, F>(&mut self, &[f32], (usize, usize), &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, F) -> core::result::Result<[core::option::Option<usize>; K], zenpredict::PredictError> where F: core::ops::function::Fn(&[f32], usize) -> f32
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::argmin_masked_with_scorer<F>(&mut self, &[f32], &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, F) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<usize>, zenpredict::PredictError> where F: core::ops::function::Fn(&[f32], usize) -> f32
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::argmin_masked_with_scorer_in_range<F>(&mut self, &[f32], (usize, usize), &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, F) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<usize>, zenpredict::PredictError> where F: core::ops::function::Fn(&[f32], usize) -> f32
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::feature_transforms(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[zenpredict::FeatureTransform]>
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::model(&self) -> &zenpredict::Model
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::n_inputs(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::n_outputs(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::new(&'a zenpredict::Model) -> Self

pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::pick_with_confidence_in_range(&mut self, &[f32], (usize, usize), &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, zenpredict::argmin::ScoreTransform, core::option::Option<&zenpredict::argmin::ArgminOffsets<'_>>) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<(usize, f32)>, zenpredict::PredictError>

pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::predict_with_specs_transformed(&mut self, &[f32]) -> core::result::Result<&[zenpredict::output_spec::OutputValue], zenpredict::PredictError>
pub fn zenpredict::Predictor<'a>::schema_hash(&self) -> u64

pub fn zenpredict::argmin_masked_with_scorer<F>(usize, &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, F) -> core::option::Option<usize> where F: core::ops::function::Fn(usize) -> f32

pub fn zenpredict::first_out_of_distribution(&[f32], &[zenpredict::FeatureBound]) -> core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn zenpredict::output_first_out_of_distribution(&[f32], &[zenpredict::OutputBound]) -> core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn zenpredict::pick_with_confidence(&[f32], &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, zenpredict::argmin::ScoreTransform, core::option::Option<&zenpredict::argmin::ArgminOffsets<'_>>) -> core::option::Option<(usize, f32)>
pub fn zenpredict::pick_with_confidence_in_range(&[f32], (usize, usize), &zenpredict::argmin::AllowedMask<'_>, zenpredict::argmin::ScoreTransform, core::option::Option<&zenpredict::argmin::ArgminOffsets<'_>>) -> core::option::Option<(usize, f32)>
pub fn zenpredict::should_rescue(f32, f32, &zenpredict::rescue::RescuePolicy) -> zenpredict::rescue::RescueDecision
pub fn zenpredict::threshold_mask(&[f32], f32, &mut [bool])
pub type zenpredict::OutputBound = zenpredict::FeatureBound
